---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a safe HMS improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What hospital workflow, safety issue, speed issue, or operational gap does this solve?

## Proposed behavior

Describe the expected behavior clearly.

## Roles and scope

Which roles should use it? Which facility/branch scope rules apply?

## Safety concerns

Could this affect patient data, payments, stock, prescriptions, reports, or audit logs?

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] UI works
- [ ] API is guarded
- [ ] Facility/branch scope is enforced
- [ ] Critical action is audited
- [ ] Tests/docs updated where practical
